theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 A → Topology.P1 A := by
  intro hP2
  intro x hx
  have : x ∈ Set.interior (closure (Set.interior A)) := hP2 hx
  exact (Set.interior_subset) this

open Topology

theorem P2_implies_P1 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    P2 A → P1 A := by
  intro h
  dsimp [P2, P1] at h ⊢
  intro x hx
  have hx' : x ∈ interior (closure (interior A)) := h hx
  exact interior_subset hx'
